---
title: "Dr. Andreas Filser"
pagetitle: "My page"
subtitle: "Sociologist | Demographer | Data Scientist<br><br>Research Data Centre<br>Institute for Employment Research (FDZ-IAB)"
image: assets/round3.png
# image-alt: "Me, smiling on our balcony"

about:
  template: solana
  image-width: 28em
  # id: hero-heading
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands bluesky >}}"
      aria-label: "Bluesky"
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/filsa.bsky.social
    - text: "{{< fa link >}}"
      aria-label: "Employer Website (IAB)"
      href: https://iab.de/mitarbeiter/?id=5370712
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}}"
      aria-label: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.de/citations?user=vP7topAAAAAJ
    - icon: github
      aria-label: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/filius23
    - text: "{{< ai orcid >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-5530-3621
    - icon: linkedin
      aria-label: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andreas-filser-85919450/
    - text: "{{< ai osf >}}"
      aria-label: "OSF"
      href: https://osf.io/m7nec/
      
page-layout: full

execute: 
  freeze: false
  echo: false
  warning: false

header-includes: >
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/index.css">
resources:
  - assets/index.css
---

<br><br>
<!-- I am a sociologist who combines conducting quantitative research with providing access to datasets and record linkage services. My own research focuses on family sociology, including relationship formation and parents’ experiences in the labour market. I also enjoy programming in R and Stata, teaching statistics, and sharing these skills with others. -->
I study family sociology, focusing on how couples navigate the labour market and how sex ratios might influence behaviour. At the FDZ-IAB in Nuremberg, I manage and analyse large datasets with R and Stata, supporting internal teams and external users, and streamlining data workflows. I also teach applied statistics and programming in R and Stata, sharing practical skills with others and foster reproducible research.

[More about me &rarr;](/about){.about-links .subtitle}
